item.title: Attempting to start Buzz Aldrin's long-dormant jet
item.description: A private jet once owned by moon landing legend Buzz Aldrin has sat idle for years — and someone decided to find out if it still had life in it. A fascinating attempt to wake up a piece of aviation history. Do you think it started?

media:content.media:title: Attempting to start Buzz Aldrin's long-dormant jet
media:content.media:description: A private jet once owned by moon landing legend Buzz Aldrin has sat idle for years — and someone decided to find out if it still had life in it. A fascinating attempt to wake up a piece of aviation history. Do you think it started?

item.title: Why the Aztec Is My Favorite
item.description: Among countless aircraft, the Aztec stands out. What makes this twin‑engine classic a personal favorite, and how does it earn its reputation?

media:content.media:title: Why the Aztec Is My Favorite
media:content.media:description: Among countless aircraft, the Aztec stands out. What makes this twin‑engine classic a personal favorite, and how does it earn its reputation?

item.title: A MiG‑23 in the Hangar? This Gets Wild
item.description: A Cold War MiG‑23 shows up in the hangar. How did this legendary jet end up here, and what surprises come with owning one?

media:content.media:title: A MiG‑23 in the Hangar? This Gets Wild
media:content.media:description: A Cold War MiG‑23 shows up in the hangar. How did this legendary jet end up here, and what surprises come with owning one?

item.title: World’s Most Powerful Civilian‑Owned Fighter Jet
item.description: A fighter jet built for war now belongs to a civilian. What makes it the most powerful privately owned aircraft, and how does it roar to life?

media:content.media:title: World’s Most Powerful Civilian‑Owned Fighter Jet
media:content.media:description: A fighter jet built for war now belongs to a civilian. What makes it the most powerful privately owned aircraft, and how does it roar to life?

item.title: Rebuilding a 1947 Cessna from Scratch
item.description: Piece by piece, a 1947 Cessna is reborn. What does it take to rebuild a classic aircraft from the ground up?

media:content.media:title: Rebuilding a 1947 Cessna from Scratch
media:content.media:description: Piece by piece, a 1947 Cessna is reborn. What does it take to rebuild a classic aircraft from the ground up?

item.title: Restoring a 37-year abandoned airplane to flight
item.description: After 37 years sitting idle, a neglected aircraft gets a full restoration and a second chance at the skies. A patient, skilled effort to bring an incredible piece of aviation history back to life. Do you think it was worth the wait?

media:content.media:title: Restoring a 37-year abandoned airplane to flight
media:content.media:description: After 37 years sitting idle, a neglected aircraft gets a full restoration and a second chance at the skies. A patient, skilled effort to bring an incredible piece of aviation history back to life. Do you think it was worth the wait?

item.title: Two airplanes bought to build one airworthy plane
item.description: Sometimes one airplane just isn't enough — especially when you need parts from two to make a single airworthy aircraft. A creative solution to a complex restoration challenge. Have you ever combined two of something to make one?

media:content.media:title: Two airplanes bought to build one airworthy plane
media:content.media:description: Sometimes one airplane just isn't enough — especially when you need parts from two to make a single airworthy aircraft. A creative solution to a complex restoration challenge. Have you ever combined two of something to make one?

item.title: Starting up a legendary 250mph museum aircraft
item.description: A museum-piece aircraft capable of 250mph gets a rare chance to come back to life — but first, the start-up challenge has to be conquered. What are the odds it fires up on the first attempt?

media:content.media:title: Starting up a legendary 250mph museum aircraft
media:content.media:description: A museum-piece aircraft capable of 250mph gets a rare chance to come back to life — but first, the start-up challenge has to be conquered. What are the odds it fires up on the first attempt?
